title: Tech Policy Conference 2026 [Advocacy Lab]
summary_full: Two years into von der Leyen 2.0’s Commission: Are the EU’s digital rules surviving or thriving? Two years into Ursula von der Leyen’s second Commission, technology is playing an unprecedented geopolitical role, after US Big Tech aligned itself with the Trump administration – which has openly threatened the EU with retaliatory tariffs and sanctions if […]
